title: VanillaStylized
description: Adds PBR Textures to Vanilla Texture
body:
# VanillaStylized
### Recommended Shader: Kappa, Nostalgia or SEUS PTGI

**VanillaStylized adds PBR textures on the basic Minecraft textures  
which is used to make some relief on the blocks**

### [The upgrade is now free (learn more)](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt/en/post/vanillastyled-is-now-free)
